name: Almond Grape Chicken Salad
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds boneless skinless chicken breasts, cooked
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut cooked chicken breast meat into 1/2 inch cubes and set aside.
2. Blend mayonnaise and sour cream in a bowl. Season with salt and pepper as needed.
3. Add cubed chicken meat, grapes, and almonds to the blended mixture and mix lightly, coating the chicken evenly.
4. Refrigerate for 1 hour before serving. Lettuce can be used instead of bread if desired.
5. If the salad is too dry, add more mayonnaise and adjust seasoning as needed.
